title: Spicy Pecan Crusted French Fries
description: A twist on classic French fries with a spicy pecan crust and crispy texture.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Spread the French fries out in a single layer.
Drizzle the olive oil over the French fries and sprinkle with salt and pepper.
Toss the French fries to coat.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
While the French fries are baking, mix the chopped pecans and chilli powder in a small bowl.
When the French fries are done, remove them from the oven and sprinkle the pecan mixture over the top.
Toss the French fries to coat.
Sprinkle with crispy fried onions if desired.
